subject: feat(home): side-by-side filters + list on wide screens, stacked on mobile
body:
Uses useWindowDimensions with a 600px breakpoint. Wide screens get
filters in a 220px sidebar with the station list filling the rest.
Narrow screens stack filters above the list. No platform-specific code.
